x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: The sn_hr_core.interaction and sys_cs_conversation tables store VA and Now Assist interaction history. Sufficient historical data allows Now Assist to learn from past interactions and improve response relevance over time.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Allow Virtual Agent and Now Assist interactions to accumulate. Drive VA adoption through channel expansion and promotion. Ensure interaction data retention policies preserve sufficient history. Target: 1,000+ conversation records in the trailing 90 days.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c39
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[The sn_hr_core.interaction and sys_cs_conversation tables store VA and Now Assist interaction history. Sufficient historical data allows Now Assist to learn from past interactions and improve response relevance over time.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Interaction Table Data Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_conversation');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' VA/Now Assist conversation records in last 90 days';

    if (count >= 1000) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' conversation records in the last 90 days. Now Assist has sufficient interaction history for conversational learning and response relevance improvement.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' conversation records in the last 90 days (target: 1,000+). Allow VA and Now Assist interactions to accumulate before expecting optimal AI response quality.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' conversation records in the last 90 days. Insufficient interaction history — Now Assist conversational AI has minimal data to learn from. Drive VA and Now Assist adoption first.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000497</number><order>180</order><remediation_guidance>Allow Virtual Agent and Now Assist interactions to accumulate. Drive VA adoption through channel expansion and promotion. Ensure interaction data retention policies preserve sufficient history. Target: 1,000+ conversation records in the trailing 90 days.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>cbf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c39</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Interaction Table Data Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c39</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
